_meta.note: British citizen passport rules, sourced from gov.uk foreign travel advice. Each entry cites the exact gov.uk page. Verify dates drift over time — re-check lastVerified.
_meta.schengenQuote: Your passport must have an expiry date at least 3 months after the day you plan to leave the Schengen area, and a date of issue less than 10 years before the date you arrive.

luxembourg.name: Luxembourg
luxembourg.quote: Your passport must have an expiry date at least 3 months after the day you plan to leave the Schengen area, and a date of issue less than 10 years before the date you arrive.

cyprus.name: Cyprus
cyprus.quote: Your passport must have a date of issue less than 10 years before the date you arrive, and an expiry date at least 3 months after the day you plan to leave.

usa.name: United States
usa.quote: To enter the US, your passport must be valid for the length of your planned stay.

canada.name: Canada
canada.quote: To enter Canada, your passport must be valid for the length of your planned stay.

australia.name: Australia
australia.quote: To enter Australia, your passport must be valid for the length of your planned stay.

japan.name: Japan
japan.quote: If you're visiting Japan, your passport must be valid for the length of your stay. No additional period of validity is required.

mexico.name: Mexico
mexico.quote: To enter Mexico, your passport must be valid for the duration of your stay.

tunisia.name: Tunisia
tunisia.quote: To enter Tunisia, your passport should be valid for the duration of your stay.

mauritius.name: Mauritius
mauritius.quote: Your passport must be valid for the duration of your stay and have one blank page.

jamaica.name: Jamaica
jamaica.quote: To enter Jamaica, your passport must be valid for the duration of your stay. You must have 2 blank pages for entry and exit stamps.

dominican-republic.name: Dominican Republic
dominican-republic.quote: British passport holders can enter and leave the Dominican Republic for tourism as long as their passport remains valid for the duration of their visit (rule stated up to 31 December 2026).

ireland.name: Ireland
ireland.quote: British nationals are not legally required to show a passport to enter Ireland, but it may be useful to carry one. Carriers (airlines/ferries) usually still require valid photo ID.

turkey.name: Turkey
turkey.quote: Your passport must have an expiry date at least 150 days after the date you arrive and at least 1 blank page.

egypt.name: Egypt
egypt.quote: To enter Egypt, your passport must have an expiry date at least 6 months after the date you arrive and have at least one blank page.

united-arab-emirates.name: United Arab Emirates
united-arab-emirates.quote: Your passport must have an expiry date at least 6 months after the date you arrive.

thailand.name: Thailand
thailand.quote: To enter Thailand, your passport must have an expiry date at least 6 months after the date you arrive and have at least 1 blank page.

india.name: India
india.quote: To enter India, your passport must have an expiry date at least 6 months after the date you arrive and have at least 2 blank pages.

indonesia.name: Indonesia
indonesia.quote: To enter Indonesia, your passport must have an expiry date at least 6 months after the date you arrive and have at least 2 blank pages.

singapore.name: Singapore
singapore.quote: To enter Singapore, your passport must have an expiry date 6 months after the date you arrive.

china.name: China
china.quote: To enter China, your passport must have an expiry date at least 6 months after the date you arrive and 2 blank pages for visas and stamping.

vietnam.name: Vietnam
vietnam.quote: Your passport must have an expiry date at least 6 months after the date you arrive and at least 2 blank pages.

malaysia.name: Malaysia
malaysia.quote: To enter Malaysia, your passport must have an expiry date at least 6 months after the date you arrive.

sri-lanka.name: Sri Lanka
sri-lanka.quote: To enter Sri Lanka, your passport must have an expiry date at least 6 months after the day you arrive.

morocco.name: Morocco
morocco.quote: To enter Morocco, your passport must have an expiry date at least 3 months after the date you arrive.

maldives.name: Maldives
maldives.quote: Your passport must have an expiry date at least one month after the date you arrive in Maldives.

south-africa.name: South Africa
south-africa.quote: Your passport must have an expiry date at least 30 days after the date you leave South Africa and have at least 2 blank pages.
